feed.title: porter.cat
feed.subtitle: I'm Porter, a software engineer and designer. I write about web development, networking, and other things I find interesting.

entry.title: Lets see what we can do with rehype pretty code
entry.summary: Syntax highlighting, line numbers, line highlights, word highlights oh boy!

entry.title: Git: This repository has moved. Please use the new location...
entry.summary: What to do when you change your git repo url on GitHub or other providers
